name: Ashwater
description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Attack Potion
description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Attack cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Beetle Juice
description: Enemy's attacks deal [blue]30%[/blue] less damage for the next [blue]4[/blue] turns.

name: Blessing of the Forge
description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] for the rest of combat.

name: Blood Potion
description: Heal for [green]20%[/green] of your Max HP.

name: Bottled Potential
description: Shuffle ALL your cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Draw [blue]5[/blue] cards.

name: Clarity Extract
description: Draw [blue]1[/blue] card. At the start of your next [blue]3[/blue] turns, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.

name: Colorless Potion
description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Colorless cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Distilled Chaos
description: Play the top [blue]3[/blue] cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

name: Droplet of Precognition
description: Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Duplicator
description: This turn, your next card is played an extra time.

name: Entropic Brew
description: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.

name: Essence of Darkness
description: [gold]Channel[/gold] a [gold]Dark[/gold] for each of your [gold]Orb Slots[/gold].

name: Fairy in a Bottle
description: When you would die, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to [blue]30%[/blue] of your Max HP.

name: Flex Potion
description: Gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

name: Foul Potion
description:
Deal [blue]12[/blue] damage to EVERYONE.
Can be thrown at the [gold]Merchant[/gold] for [blue]100[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] instead.

name: Gambler's Brew
description: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

name: Gigantification Potion
description: The next Attack you play deals triple damage.

name: Liquid Memories
description: Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue] [energy:1] this turn.

name: Orobic Acid
description: Add a random Attack, Skill, and Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They're free to play this turn.

name: Powdered Demise
description: Enemy loses [blue]9[/blue] HP at the end of each of its turns.

name: Power Potion
description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Power cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Radiant Tincture
description: Gain [energy:1]. Gain an additional [energy:1] at the start of your next [blue]3[/blue] turns.

name: Skill Potion
description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Skill cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Snecko Oil
description: Draw [blue]7[/blue] cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.

name: Soldier's Stew
description: All cards containing [gold]Strike[/gold] gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Replay[/gold] this combat.

name: Speed Potion
description: Gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

name: Touch of Insanity
description: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It is free to play this combat.
